mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_session WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND product_id = #{productId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_session (member_id, member_name, product_id, product_name, product_pic, status, create_time) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{memberName}, #{productId}, #{productName}, #{productPic}, 1, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_session SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE chat_session SET last_message = #{lastMessage}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_session WHERE admin_id = #{adminId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY update_time DESC
SELECT * FROM chat_session WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY update_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (session_id, sender_type, sender_id, sender_name, content, msg_type, is_read, create_time) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{senderType}, #{senderId}, #{senderName}, #{content}, 1, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM chat_message WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY create_time ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE chat_message SET is_read = 1 WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND sender_type != #{senderType} AND is_read = 0
UPDATE chat_session SET admin_id = #{adminId}, admin_name = #{adminName} WHERE id = #{id} AND admin_id IS NULL
